records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, making a living is way too much work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, making a living is way too much work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, making a living is way too much work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I get that the mansion is huge, but this is ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I get that the mansion is huge, but this is ridiculous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I get that the mansion is huge, but this is ridiculous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... The stench of Corruption is thick in here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... The stench of Corruption is thick in here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... The stench of Corruption is thick in here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What kind of experiments were they running?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What kind of experiments were they running?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What kind of experiments were they running?

records.m_Talk_ENG: First, they take my blood, and now this...
records.m_Talk_DEU: First, they take my blood, and now this...
records.m_Talk_FRA: First, they take my blood, and now this...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could the nun and my client be working together?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could the nun and my client be working together?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could the nun and my client be working together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lure me deep inside, then BAM! Harvest my organs.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lure me deep inside, then BAM! Harvest my organs.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lure me deep inside, then BAM! Harvest my organs.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I did hear Counter organs sell for a fortune...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I did hear Counter organs sell for a fortune...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I did hear Counter organs sell for a fortune...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well... might as well check further inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well... might as well check further inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well... might as well check further inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If he really was some big-shot Corruption expert, he might have data on my sickness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If he really was some big-shot Corruption expert, he might have data on my sickness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If he really was some big-shot Corruption expert, he might have data on my sickness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And hey, if I find anything valuable, no harm in taking a bonus.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And hey, if I find anything valuable, no harm in taking a bonus.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And hey, if I find anything valuable, no harm in taking a bonus.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The blood scent... it leads that way?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The blood scent... it leads that way?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The blood scent... it leads that way?
